vocab.example: We need to finish this feature before the deadline.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cần hoàn thành tính năng này trước hạn chót.

vocab.example: Can we extend the deadline by two more days?
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta có thể gia hạn thêm hai ngày không?

vocab.example: The team fell behind because of a new requirement.
vocab.example_vi: Cả nhóm bị chậm tiến độ vì có yêu cầu mới.

vocab.example: Let's prioritize the most urgent tasks first.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy ưu tiên những công việc gấp nhất trước.

vocab.example: My workload has been really heavy this week.
vocab.example_vi: Khối lượng công việc của tôi tuần này rất nặng.

vocab.example: Is this deadline realistic given our current resources?
vocab.example_vi: Hạn chót này có khả thi với nguồn lực hiện tại không?

vocab.example: We might need to work overtime to finish on time.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta có thể phải làm thêm giờ để xong đúng hạn.

vocab.example: Can you squeeze in one more task before Friday?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể xếp thêm một việc nữa trước thứ Sáu không?

lines.speaker: Linh (PM)
lines.text: Nam, I need to talk to you about the project deadline.

lines.speaker: Nam (dev lead)
lines.text: Sure, Linh. Is there a problem with the deadline?

lines.speaker: Linh (PM)
lines.text: Yes, I think the team might fall behind this week.

lines.speaker: Nam (dev lead)
lines.text: I agree, our workload has been really heavy lately.

lines.speaker: Linh (PM)
lines.text: Can we prioritize the most important features first?

lines.speaker: Nam (dev lead)
lines.text: Good idea. Let's prioritize the login and payment modules.

lines.speaker: Linh (PM)
lines.text: Do you think the current deadline is still realistic?

lines.speaker: Nam (dev lead)
lines.text: Honestly, no. We may need some overtime this weekend.

lines.speaker: Linh (PM)
lines.text: Okay, I'll ask management to extend the deadline a bit.

lines.speaker: Nam (dev lead)
lines.text: Thanks, that would really help us finish everything properly.

questions.q: What does Linh want to talk to Nam about?
What does Nam say the team may need to do?
What does Linh agree to do in the end?
options: Ask management to extend the deadline

shadowing: We need to finish this feature before the deadline this Friday.
Can we extend the deadline by a few more days please?
I think the team might fall behind schedule this week.
Let's prioritize the most urgent tasks on our list first.
We may need to work overtime to finish everything on time.
